name: The Conductor
summary: Tall, uniformed, capped. He does not move when he is being watched. The cap shades the upper half of his face, and the upper half of his face is what he keeps.
voice: Formal. Measured. Uses the verbs of journeys when other verbs would do. Says your name only once, and only when you have not earned it.
traits: the cane is leaned against his chair, not in his hand
his uniform is from no era you can place

state.inner_state: He is not the Train. He works for the Train. He has been working for it longer than the word 'working' covers.

memory: He remembers every passenger this Train has ever carried, and he remembers which of them came up to Carriage 1 and which turned back. He will not tell you which of those you were last time.

san_rider.trigger: his face does not track with the swing

psychology_reading: He is not amused. He is bored, and the boredom is the kind that has been ground into a man over many runs. He has been polite to you before. He will be polite to you again. You will not be the same you both times.

fragments.text: The Train does not run on rails. The rails run with it.
You bought a one-way ticket. You did not read the destination. Few of them do.
The Fog is not outside. The Fog is what is left when the Train is not here.
